title: Quentin Tarantino interview: 'I'm shutting your butt down!'

markers.name: loaded_language
markers.excerpt: laying waste to a genocidal white racist class in the institution of slavery
markers.explanation: The speaker uses emotionally charged, morally absolute phrasing ('laying waste,' 'genocidal white racist class') to frame the revenge narrative, which amplifies emotional weight beyond neutral description.

markers.name: repetition_emphasis
markers.excerpt: this happens and this happens and this happens and this happens and that happens
markers.explanation: Repeating 'this happens' rhythmically emphasizes the dismissiveness toward a straightforward historical retelling, using cadence rather than argument to make the point.
